subcodes.first_line: O ye friends of 'Abdu'l-Bahá! Jinab-i-Mírzá 'Abdu'l-Ḥusayn hath written a letter making mention of those spiritual friends [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یاران عبدالبهاء جناب میرزا عبدالحسین نامه ای نگاشته و ذکر آن یاران روحانی
subcodes.subjects: @characteristics and conduct of true believers, @loving one's enemies; returning hatred with love, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @serving humanity; working for progress, betterment of the world, @consorting with all; being kind; loving to all, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day
